subject: Social Sciences
title: South African History
tagline: Explore the stories of indigenous peoples — San, Khoikhoi and Nguni!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: Who are considered South Africa's earliest inhabitants?
options: A philosophy of humanity and community
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The San people is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The San people.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What were the San people known for?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Hunting, gathering and rock art is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Hunting, gathering and rock art.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What were the Khoikhoi known for?
options: A philosophy of humanity and community
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Herding livestock is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Herding livestock.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What language family do many indigenous SA languages belong to?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Bantu languages is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Bantu languages.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What is 'ubuntu'?
options: A philosophy of humanity and community
stages.correctOption: A philosophy of humanity and community
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A philosophy of humanity and community is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A philosophy of humanity and community.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: What did indigenous South Africans use rock art to record?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Stories, beliefs and daily life is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Stories, beliefs and daily life.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: Which indigenous group herded cattle in the Cape before colonisation?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Khoikhoi is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Khoikhoi.

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What tool did San hunters use?
options: A philosophy of humanity and community
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Bow and arrow is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Bow and arrow.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: Where can famous San rock art be found?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The Drakensberg mountains is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The Drakensberg mountains.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: What did indigenous communities often use to pass down history?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Oral tradition and storytelling is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Oral tradition and storytelling.
